title: dryopteris effusa
intro: Dryopteris effusa, also known as the wall fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris effusa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris effusa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
